title: Epic Knights X Epic Fight (Unofficial)
description: This datapack/mod allows Epic Knights and Epic Fight to be compatible.
body:
Ths mod/datapack allows Epic Knights to be compatable with Epic fight. Here are the weapons changed so far:


<details>
<summary>Blacksmith Hammer</summary>
Type: Twohand

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>


<details>
<summary>Barbed Club</summary>
Type: Twohand

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>


<details>
<summary>Pitchfork</summary>
Type: Twohand

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>


<details>
<summary>Noble Sword</summary>
Type: Twohand

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>



<details>
<summary>Messer</summary>
Type: Onehand(Can be dual wielded with axe)

Damage/Attack Speed Change: Yes(when dual wielding)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Stiletto</summary>
Type: Onehand(Can be dual wielded with another Stiletto)

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>


<details>
<summary>Short Sword</summary>
Type: Onehand(Can be dual wieleded with another Short Sword)

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>


<details>
<summary>Katzbalger</summary>
Type: Onehand(Can be dual wieleded with another Katzbalger)

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>


<details>
<summary>Pike</summary>
Type: Twohand

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>



<details>
<summary>Ranseur</summary>
Type: Twohand(Onehand with shield)

Damage/Attack Speed Change: No
</details>

Feel free to make a video on this mod/datapack

May be used in modpacks without my permission. Used the Epic Fight Datapack Creator. Uses built in animations.
